title: Bread Slippers
description: Simple slippers made from bread. You can brag about them on Twitter
body: ![Bread Slippers](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d593524293a1706bcbb1891fe6795b1aaee16397.png) ### 📖 About Adds Bread Slippers which can be crafted from bread, Bread Block which can be crafted into Carved Bread with a shovel to get Bread Crumbs. Carved Bread can be worn on head and Bread Crumbs can be eaten. ![Description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7efcc8399698b5a4cc24064cb67233ea808ba0c3.png) ### 🔨 Crafting recipes
